mapper.select: select cp.*, c.name as campus_name, g.name as grade_name, cls.name as class_name, p.real_name as parent_name, t.real_name as teacher_name from child_profile cp left join campus_info c on cp.campus_id = c.id left join grade_info g on cp.grade_id = g.id left join class_info cls on cp.class_id = cls.id left join sys_user p on cp.parent_id = p.id left join sys_user t on cp.teacher_id = t.id where cp.parent_id = #{parentId} order by cp.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into child_profile (child_name, gender, birthday, campus_id, grade_id, class_id, parent_id, teacher_id, allergy_info, pickup_person, profile_status) values (#{childName}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{campusId}, #{gradeId}, #{classId}, #{parentId}, #{teacherId}, #{allergyInfo}, #{pickupPerson}, #{profileStatus})
